message:
fix: exclude tools/optimize_params from default build + add --recurse-submodules to install.sh

Fixes frankensearch #23 — installation broken on macOS and Linux.

Problem 1 (workspace build failure): tools/optimize_params depends on
fast_cmaes via a relative path (../../../fast_cmaes) that doesn't exist
when users clone the repo. Add `default-members` to the workspace so
`cargo build` / `cargo check` only builds the core crates by default.
The optimize_params tool remains a workspace member for developers who
have fast_cmaes checked out, but it won't break first-time builds.

Problem 2 (install.sh source build): The git clone commands in the
from-source build path didn't include --recurse-submodules, so any
submodule-dependent build would fail. Both clone invocations (versioned
and unversioned) now pass --recurse-submodules.

Also includes lexical crate pagination improvements (LexicalSearchResult
with total_count) from concurrent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -372,9 +372,15 @@ if [ "$FROM_SOURCE" -eq 1 ]; then
   info "Building from source (requires git, rust nightly)"
   ensure_rust
   if [ -n "$VERSION" ]; then
-    git clone --depth 1 --branch "$VERSION" "https://github.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git" "$TMP/src"
+    git clone --depth 1 --recurse-submodules --branch "$VERSION" "https://github.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git" "$TMP/src"
   else
-    git clone --depth 1 "https://github.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git" "$TMP/src"
+    git clone --depth 1 --recurse-submodules "https://github.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git" "$TMP/src"
+  fi
+  # Remove optional workspace members whose path dependencies (e.g. fast_cmaes)
+  # live outside the repository and are unavailable in a fresh clone.
+  if [ -f "$TMP/src/Cargo.toml" ]; then
+    sed -i.bak '/"tools\/optimize_params"/d' "$TMP/src/Cargo.toml"
+    rm -f "$TMP/src/Cargo.toml.bak"
   fi
   if [ "$LITE" -eq 1 ]; then
     info "Building lite variant (no embedded models)"
